title: I built a trading dashboard that monitors 2,500+ tickers and auto-generates signals - is this useful or am I solving a problem that doesn't exist?
author: SpiritLeather5761

comments.author: wado729
comments.body: It looks like something useful.  Have you run backtest on the generated signals to see if they're profitable?

replies.author: SpiritLeather5761
replies.body: hey thanks ! the main purpose of the dashboard is to collate information that would normally have to fetch via different sources. i am testing the platform right now but substantially make determinations on the trades myself as i always did except now i have a more immediate access to the information as well as the signals that flag tickers to be checked. the AI functionalities help me in building the picture and make the determination but this is indeed not the main use of the platform.

replies.author: BuildwithPublic
replies.body: This looks really interesting- have you thought about what you are going to do with the signals in terms of executing?
